Basedash: AI data analystp/basedashMax Musing•

1d ago

### Will the spreadsheet outlive every AI tool we're building right now? [...] Every few years someone declares the spreadsheet dead. Notion was going to kill it, then Airtable, then a hundred AI tools, and now agents are supposedly going to make it obsolete too.

But Excel is 40 years old and still runs most of the actual decisions at most actual companies. I'd bet it outlasts almost everything launching on this site this year, including a lot of stuff I love.
